'''Ygziir''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy]] that was home to a [[Domain Steng|domain]] allied to [[Warmaster]] [[Steng]], possibly his own. It was [[Battle of Ygziir|destroyed]] in the [[Cremlevian War]], together with its [[Moon/Legends|moon]].

The rival Warmaster [[Yo'gand]]'s [[Domain Yo'gand|domain]] used a large [[dovin basal]] to pull the moon into the planet; it would later become known as the [[Yo'gand's Core]] tactic. Steng's domain either surrendered or was wiped out. Considering the protocols of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], the latter is the more likely.
